# SEO Governance Checklist

For SEO, canonical, sitemap, robots, country pages, content pages.

```md
- [ ] Every new / changed page has unique `<title>`, `<h1>`, meta description
- [ ] `<link rel="canonical">` points to `https://goldtickerlive.com/<path>`
- [ ] `og:url` matches canonical
- [ ] Hreflang pair present for any EN/AR pair
- [ ] OG image present (use branded fallback if no page-specific one)
- [ ] Schema injected via `scripts/node/inject-schema.js`, not hand-authored
- [ ] `sitemap.xml` not hand-edited (generated by build step)
- [ ] New noindex page → entry in `scripts/node/seo-governance.js`
- [ ] No keyword stuffing in title / description
- [ ] Country / city / karat pages have local-context paragraph (not just templated name swap)
- [ ] At least one internal link in + one internal link out (to methodology, calculator, sibling)
- [ ] `npm run seo:governance:check` passes
- [ ] `npm run validate` passes (includes SEO meta + sitemap coverage)
- [ ] `npm run linkcheck` reviewed for broken internal links
- [ ] Custom domain canonical (no `vctb12.github.io` in `<link rel=canonical>` or `og:url`)
- [ ] `robots.txt` unchanged unless intentional
- [ ] Search Console verification tag still present in `index.html`
```

See [`.github/instructions/seo.instructions.md`](../../../instructions/seo.instructions.md)
and [`.github/instructions/content-country-pages.instructions.md`](../../../instructions/content-country-pages.instructions.md).
